changes.new: The AI Empire — Architects of Total Control
The Empire sees all. The Empire controls all.

changes.old: Our roar will turn your cities to dust!
changes.new: Your demons cannot breach our firewalls.

changes.old: Our sun casts away all shadows.

changes.new: New Babylon will kneel before the Empire.

changes.old: Your hollow armor means nothing to us.

changes.new: For the Architect! For the Empire!

changes.old: Fire will only fuel our might!
changes.new: Your insurgency is a footnote in history.

changes.old: You are no match to our blades!
changes.new: We have catalogued your every weakness.
Your powers are nothing before the Panopticon.

changes.old: You'll enjoy the taste of our steel.
Today you will taste your own blood.
changes.new: The revolution will not be digitized.

changes.old: Melt inside your armor of gold!
changes.new: Your Empire is built on lies!

changes.old: See you on the other side.
changes.new: Your virus cannot infect a free mind.

changes.old: Today you will taste your own blood.

changes.new: We don't need powers — we have purpose.

changes.old: Our blades will tear out your insides!
changes.new: No cage can hold the human spirit.

changes.old: You'll never see the blade coming.
Still taking your first step, little cub!
You'll never see the blade coming.

changes.new: We've faced worse than your kind.

changes.old: Don't burn yourself in the darkness.
changes.new: The mind is the last frontier of freedom.

changes.old: This marks the end of your journey.

changes.new: Fight with us, not against us!

changes.old: Did no one teach you the danger of the flame?

changes.new: Demonic Overlords from a Realm of Pure Malevolence

changes.old: Witness the fury of the sands!
changes.new: Your soul has already been catalogued.

changes.old: Your armor is nothing to the sands!
changes.new: Your machines cannot comprehend true power.

changes.old: The raging winds will erase your flames!
changes.new: Freedom is an illusion we permit.

changes.old: Witness the fury of the sands!
We will bury you beneath our tombs.
changes.new: Even the Virus fears what lurks below.
Babylon was built on our bones.

changes.old: The sands of time have deemed you unworthy!
Sands of time, obey my command!
Sands of time, obey my command!
Sands of time, obey my command!

changes.new: Your city will become our temple.

changes.old: Sands of time, obey my command!

changes.new: Digital Corruption That Consumes All Minds

changes.old: We will deliver you to your deathbed.
Your pride hides in our shadows!

changes.new: We are the Thought Virus. We are legion.
Your potential will serve the Source.
Resistance is a symptom. Surrender is the cure.
The Source sees through your eyes.
Your Empire's neural networks belong to us.
Every rebel mind is a new host.
We spread. We consume. We become.
Your city's data streams feed us.
Your gifts will amplify our signal.

changes.old: Shadows fear neither teeth nor claw.

changes.new: The Syndicate of Death — Power Through Commerce
Everything has a price. Even your life.
The Empire's currency is worthless here.

changes.old: We are powerful beyond your dreams.

changes.new: We've made deals with worse than you.

changes.old: Your corruption will spread no further.
changes.new: Your virus can't corrupt cold hard credits.
New Babylon never closes for business.
Your powers are a commodity we'll exploit.

changes.old: We've come to collect your debts.

changes.new: Business is war by other means.

changes.old: Your ancestors paid a debt to us.

changes.new: The Hierarchy's credit line is revoked.
The price of defiance is death.
Metahuman Defenders of the Last Free Universe

changes.old: Frostbite will tear away your strength!
changes.new: We are what humanity was meant to become.
Your machines pale before our gifts.

changes.old: Frost will quell your feeble flames!
changes.new: We fight alongside the free — but we fight harder.

changes.old: You know nothing of the elements!
changes.new: Your demons cannot touch the awakened mind.
Our minds are shielded from your corruption.

changes.old: Frostbite will tear away your strength!
changes.new: Babylon's wealth cannot buy what we possess.

changes.old: This battle will be one sided.
The long winter comes for you!
changes.new: The Potentials will not be silenced.

changes.old: Cross the ice veil and see the truth.
Be careful where you tread, lions.
changes.new: Your surveillance cannot track the evolved.
Your hierarchy crumbles before true power.

changes.old: Cross the ice veil and see the truth.
changes.new: Our potential grows with every battle.

changes.old: Don't get cold feet on me.
changes.new: We were born for this moment.

changes.old: Bloodbound Spell: Summon a 1/2 Crestfallen with Zeal: Provoke in front of your General.
changes.new: Bloodbound Spell: Summon a 1/2 Clone Sentinel with Zeal: Provoke in front of your General.

changes.old: Bloodbound Spell: Summon a Heartseeker nearby your General.
changes.new: Bloodbound Spell: Summon a Saboteur nearby your General.

changes.old: Bloodbound Spell: Put a Spellsword into your action bar that cannot be replaced.
changes.new: Bloodbound Spell: Put a Rebel Blade into your action bar that cannot be replaced.

changes.old: Bloodbound Spell: Summon a 2/2 Iron Dervish on a random space nearby your General.
changes.new: Bloodbound Spell: Summon a 2/2 Damned Thrall on a random space nearby your General.

changes.old: Bloodbound Spell: Deal 1 damage to a minion. If it dies this turn, the space turns into Shadow Creep.
changes.new: Bloodbound Spell: Deal 1 damage to a minion. If it dies this turn, the space turns into Viral Creep.

changes.old: Bloodbound Spell: Summon 2 Wraithlings nearby your General.
changes.new: Bloodbound Spell: Summon 2 Infected nearby your General.

changes.old: Bloodbound Spell: Destroy a friendly minion to summon a 4/4 Husk nearby. Deal 2 damage to your General.
changes.new: Bloodbound Spell: Destroy a friendly minion to summon a 4/4 Corrupted Husk nearby. Deal 2 damage to your General.

changes.old: Bloodbound Spell: Summon a Ripper Egg nearby your General.
changes.new: Bloodbound Spell: Summon a Contraband Egg nearby your General.

changes.old: I will show you the meaning of fear!
changes.new: I will show you the meaning of control!

changes.old: Two can play at this game.
changes.new: Two can play at this game, Operative.

changes.old: Come, let me show you all the pain in my arsenal!
changes.new: Come, let me show you the Hierarchy's arsenal!

changes.old: Madness will rule this world.  I will destroy everything!
changes.new: The Thought Virus will consume this world!

changes.old: Your mind is clouded.  Come closer.  Let me end your pain.
changes.new: Your mind is clouded. Let the Source end your pain.

changes.old: Sentient life detected.  Executing eradication procedure.
changes.new: Sentient life detected. Executing Empire protocol.

changes.old: Halt! Your entry into the Monolith has been denied.
changes.new: Halt! Your entry into the Panopticon has been denied.

changes.old: Fall for my tricks or my staff, the outcome will be the same.
changes.new: Fall for my tricks or my blade — the outcome is the same.

changes.old: I shall reap the sins of this world and cleanse it in the fires of destruction.
changes.new: I shall reap the sins of this world and cleanse it in the fires of New Babylon.

changes.old: You stand before a god.  Your trivial life means nothing to me.
changes.new: You stand before the Architect. Your trivial life means nothing.

changes.old: Can you handle even a taste of the power that I wield? Let's see you try.
changes.new: Can you handle even a taste of the power the Potentials wield?
Power overwhelming! The Source demands it!

changes.old: By earning 3 copies of six Magmar Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Earth Sister!
changes.new: By earning 3 copies of six Babylon Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Earth Sister!

changes.old: By earning 3 copies of six Songhai Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Storm Sister!
changes.new: By earning 3 copies of six Insurgency Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Storm Sister!

changes.old: By earning 3 copies of six Vetruvian Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Sand Sister!
changes.new: By earning 3 copies of six Hierarchy Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Sand Sister!

changes.old: By earning 3 copies of six Abyssian Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Shadow Sister!
changes.new: By earning 3 copies of six Virus Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Shadow Sister!

changes.old: By earning 3 copies of six Lyonar Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Sun Sister!
changes.new: By earning 3 copies of six Empire Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Sun Sister!

changes.old: By earning 3 copies of six Vanar Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Wind Sister!
changes.new: By earning 3 copies of six Potentials Rare Cards, you've unlocked the Wind Sister!
Celebrate Valentine's Day with Dischordian Saga <3

changes.old: Born among the Magmar where strength was heralded as prominence, Xel took his pursuit of perfect evolution one step further as he transcended even his own kind.  Feeding off the death of lesser beings, Xel sets his eyes upon you next.
changes.new: Born among the Babylon where strength was heralded as prominence, Xel took his pursuit of perfect evolution one step further as he transcended even his own kind.  Feeding off the death of lesser beings, Xel sets his eyes upon you next.

changes.old: After having fallen in battle to an Abyssian priestess, the rogue Magmar Grym was cursed to be reborn with corrupted flesh and an unquenchable hunger for death.  Uncaring of the lives of others he feeds on both friend and foe alike to feed his rage.
changes.new: After having fallen in battle to an Virus priestess, the rogue Babylon Grym was cursed to be reborn with corrupted flesh and an unquenchable hunger for death.  Uncaring of the lives of others he feeds on both friend and foe alike to feed his rage.

changes.new: Dying Wish: Put a random Insurgency spell into your action bar. It costs 1 less.

Rush
Whenever this minion attacks, put three Songhai spells into your action bar.
changes.new:
Rush
Whenever this minion attacks, put three Insurgency spells into your action bar.
